name: ghostwriter
description: AST-based code reducer for minimizing context size during debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce large files into high-signal debugging context.
interface.longDescription: GhostWriter helps Codex focus on the relevant logic in large files by replacing unrelated bodies with placeholders before analysis.
defaultPrompt: Use GhostWriter on a large file before debugging it.
Prune this source file around the failing line.
Reduce this module to just the logic near the bug.
